name: team pass attempts from plays using dst
description: Test case for team pass attempts from plays using dst
expected_query: with "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279" as (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(CASE WHEN psr_pid IS NOT NULL AND (sk IS NULL OR sk = false) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS team_pass_att_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats" as (select "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279"."nfl_team", sum(t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279.team_pass_att_from_plays) as team_pass_att_from_plays from "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279" group by "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279"."nfl_team") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, CASE WHEN rosters_players.slot = 13 THEN 'injured_reserve' WHEN rosters_players.slot = 12 THEN 'practice_squad' WHEN rosters_players.slot IS NULL THEN 'free_agent' ELSE 'active_roster' END AS player_league_roster_status, rosters_players.slot, rosters_players.tid, rosters_players.tag, "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."team_pass_att_from_plays" AS "team_pass_att_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "rosters_players" on "rosters_players"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "rosters_players"."year" = 2026 and "rosters_players"."week" = 0 and "rosters_players"."lid" = 1 left join "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats" on "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player"."current_nfl_team" where player.pos IN ('DST') group by player.fname, player.lname, rosters_players.slot, rosters_players.tid, rosters_players.tag, "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."team_pass_att_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 8 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
